docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MELILLO, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT YACKLEY, STEPHANIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
LETTER FOR REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL FROM STEPHANIE YACKLEY REC'D AND FOWWARDED TO JUDGE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($50 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED MAR-14-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YACKLEY, STEPHANIE
RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT'S MAR-21-2011 LETTER FOR REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL; FILED BY PLAINTIFF MELILLO, LARRY
ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL. THE REQUEST IS DENIED. THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING WILL PROCEED AS SCHEDULED ON APR-20-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-20-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-20-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506) (PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED, BUT LEFT IN COURT, PLACE IN PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE ENVELOPE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MELILLO, LARRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YACKLEY, STEPHANIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF AUG-01-2014
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
